# QoF v1.2.2's Changelog

> [!NOTE]
> A Minecraft Bedrock addon that adds small vanilla-friendly features. Each module is configurable through the in-game pack settings panel. Requires **BetaAPIs** enabled under Experiments.

## Pack Info

Full changelog: [v1.2.2](https://github.com/aitji/QoF/commits/v1.2.2) or [compare](https://github.com/aitji/QoF/compare/v1.2.1...v1.2.2) Releases: [v1.2.2](https://github.com/aitji/QoF/releases/tag/v1.2.2) LICENSE: [MIT](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/aitji/QoF/refs/heads/main/LICENSE)\
Release Date: [Mar/18/2026 (19:54:14)](https://time.is/Unix_time_converter/1773863654)

Base Game Version: [26.3](https://feedback.minecraft.net/hc/en-us/articles/43861703542925-Minecraft-Bedrock-Edition-26-3-Changelog)\
Dependency: [2.6.0@beta](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@minecraft/server/v/2.6.0-beta.1.26.3-stable)

## Changelogs

## Mob Loot+

Add mob loot to previously unlootable mobs
> @pickerth-12 here!

### Recipe+

A more accessible way to obtain items
> @pickerth-12 here!

## Configs
- offhand are now configable through in game world settings

## (New) Offhand
- Allow player to double sneak and swap main hand and off hand
- Enchantment and Item color still won't be able to tranfer, dude to api limitation aren't allow to edit the offhand cleanly

## (New) Harvest
- Allow player to hold the hoe and harvest with seed replant
- Hoe will loss durability* when destorying the seeds in order to balance and auto replanting\
\* durability calculated base on real minecraft formula $\mathrm{Loss} = \mathrm{random} < \frac{1}{\mathrm{level} + 1}$

## Composter+
- composter no longer using hard-code vanilla list to check is item compostable in vanilla, and use offical item compostable componets
- add bow return logic, inside hopper logic
- 

## Dev Side & Bug Fixed
- fix grammaly in `manifest.json`
- fix powder concrete try to spawn item on unloaded chunck
- fix light block "try" place on unloaded chunck
- fix shovel & hoe not working while having light block above the dirt type
- bump up `@minecraft` in `package.json` from `^2.5.0` to `^2.6.0-beta.1.26.3-stable`, give dev more tools to work with
